message:
feat(ui): responsive layout polish and multi-select indicator

Improve TUI layout for varying terminal widths and add selection
awareness throughout the UI:

- Results title: show selection count when items are multi-selected
  (e.g. "Results (42) • 3 selected")
- Search bar: use human-readable mode labels ("lexical"/"semantic"/
  "hybrid") instead of Debug format; collapse theme name at <80 cols
- Status bar: add width-adaptive keyboard hints (full hints at ≥100
  cols, "?=help" at ≥60 cols, none at narrower widths); show
  selection count tag; use Ctrl+B shorthand instead of "Ctrl+B"
- Analytics header: collapse view tabs to just current view label
  at <100 cols to prevent overflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
